category_sources: Official GNU idutils homepage describes tools to create and query an ID database for text-searching tasks across large source hierarchies.
source_facts.description says ID database and query tools.
display_name_sources: Official GNU homepage title is `ID Utils - GNU Project`.
docs_sources: Official GNU homepage links to the official GNU idutils manual.
repo_sources: GNU Savannah project summary lists idutils as official GNU software and provides a Git repository browser.
Official GNU homepage gives Savannah source-control checkout instructions for idutils.
tags_sources: Official GNU homepage describes indexing identifiers and searching source hierarchies.
source_facts.executables lists ID database/query tools such as `mkid`, `lid`, and `fid`.
